ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Default measurement unit for the region (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor_to_cm" TEXT /* Conversion factor to centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_labels" (
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size label belongs to */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Name of the size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size label */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size label is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_labels_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement */,
  "chest_depth" TEXT /* Chest depth measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor_to_inch" TEXT /* Conversion factor to inches */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the measurement data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product line is intended */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the style belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., Casual, Formal, Sport) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is intended */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the style */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, production manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the region (e.g., US, EU)
Default measurement unit for the region (e.g., inches, centimeters)
Last time the region's data was updated
